reviews.review_msg: Good professor and very approachable guy. Knowledgeable about the material and corresponds in a timely manner with student queries. Would take again!
I had a lot of fun in 202 but the last project is worth like 50% of your grade and its a group project so just make sure to choose your teammates well.

Class definitely isn't easy. 3 main projects that are graded tough, and they require a lot of effort; it shouldn't be that much of a surprise since it's a filmmaking course and making a short film along with other filmed assignments takes a lot of effort! Labs are mandatory to learn anything in the class, but the professor and TA are very kind!
